Items.Title: The man no-one wants to face - Haaland fires Norway to history
Items.Description: Erling Haaland has scored seven goals in four World Cup games and he is the striker that nobody wants to face as he fires Norway into an historic quarter-final.

Items.Title: Ageing Brazil need major surgery - but is Ancelotti the man to do it?
Items.Description: There was nothing unlucky about Brazil's loss to Norway in the last 16 of the World Cup and their exit at this stage is an unmitigated disaster, writes Tim Vickery.

Items.Title: Neymar announces Brazil retirement after World Cup exit
Items.Description: Neymar has announced his retirement from international football. Brazil's World Cup journey ended
